message.entry: First input argument to PLOTTOOLS should be a valid handle
The plot tools are not supported on this platform.
{0}\n\nPlease enter a variable name or a valid MATLAB expression.
The first argument to plotExpressions must be an axes handle!
The first argument must be a figure handle!
The first argument to getBarAreaColor must be a figure handle!
Interactive subplot arrangement not supported for charts in a TiledChartLayout.
